summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of ACM updates: Agent association badges in EvalRuns and JobDetail pages, and format presets for scratch_bench_phased type in Dataset Editor. All 10 requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: EvalRuns page: Each job row displays agent_name badge from job.config.experiments.agent_name (14 badges found)
EvalRuns page: Agent badges show correctly with blue background styling and data-testid='agent-badge-{id}'
EvalRuns page: Model badges display when job.config.experiments.model_name exists (0 found - jobs without model_name)
JobDetail page: Header shows agent badge with data-testid='job-agent-badge' (fork_fullstack_codex_5_3)
JobDetail page: Header shows model badge with data-testid='job-model-badge' (gpt-5.3-codex)
JobDetail page: Details panel shows Agent field with agent_name value
JobDetail page: Details panel shows Model field with model_name value
Dataset Editor: New dataset with scratch_bench_phased type pre-fills Problem Statement with <phases> template
Dataset Editor: New dataset with scratch_bench_phased type pre-fills NL Tests with <phases> template
Dataset Editor: Changing type to bug_bench clears the <phases> preset (fields become empty)
Dataset Editor: Changing type back to scratch_bench_phased restores the <phases> preset
critical_code_review_comments: Agent badges correctly styled with bg-blue-500/5 and border-blue-500/20
Model badges use neutral outline styling for visual distinction
FORMAT_PRESETS object correctly handles type-specific templates
handleTypeChange function properly applies presets when creating new datasets
seed_data_creation: None - used existing jobs and datasets from API
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features for iteration 12 are working: EvalRuns page displays agent badges (agent-badge-{id}) and model badges (model-badge-{id}) from job.config.experiments. JobDetail page shows agent/model badges in header (job-agent-badge, job-model-badge) and in Details panel. Dataset Editor correctly pre-fills Problem Statement and NL Tests with <phases></phases> template for scratch_bench_phased type, clears them for bug_bench, and restores when switching back.
